hooks.command: if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Log reminder: update project_logs/ if this session shipped changes.","hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"REMINDER: git status shows modifications. Before ending, update project_logs/CHANGELOG.md (append dated entry at top), project_logs/STATE.md (bump date + changed sections), project_logs/ROADMAP.md (if plans changed). See CLAUDE.md end-of-session rule."}}'; fi
